---
title: "Kunstig neuron app"
---

Herunder gives en grundig gennemgang af hver af fanerne i **Kunstig Neuron App**.


<!-- ## <span class="toggle-icon">Data</span> {.collapsible} -->


## [Data]{.toggle-icon} {.collapsible}


::: {.collapse-content}

{{< include data.qmd >}}

:::


## [Variable]{.toggle-icon} {.collapsible}

::: {.collapse-content}

{{< include target-variabel.qmd >}}

{{< include target-vaerdi.qmd >}}

{{< include feature-variable.qmd >}}

:::


## [Træning]{.toggle-icon} {.collapsible}

::: {.collapse-content}

{{< include traening.qmd >}}

:::


## [Evaluering & Prædiktion]{.toggle-icon} {.collapsible}

::: {.collapse-content}

{{< include eval_pred.qmd >}} 

:::
